stimulus:
[Bar graph: Area of Three Glaciers in the 2018 Patagonia Glacier Inventory. Vertical axis: Area (square kilometers).]

  • Perito Moreno glacier: 250 km²
  • Viedma glacier: 575 km²
  • O’Higgins glacier: 380 km²

According to the graph, the Viedma glacier has ______
stem: Which choice most effectively uses data from the graph to complete the example?

answerOptions.content: a larger area than either the Perito Moreno glacier or the O’Higgins glacier.
a smaller area than the Perito Moreno glacier but a larger area than the O’Higgins glacier.
a smaller area than either the Perito Moreno glacier or the O’Higgins glacier.
a larger area than the Perito Moreno glacier but a smaller area than the O’Higgins glacier.

rationale:
Choice A is correct because the Viedma glacier (575 km²) has a larger area than the Perito Moreno glacier (250 km²) and the O’Higgins glacier (380 km²).

Choice B is incorrect: Viedma is larger, not smaller, than Perito Moreno. Choice C is incorrect: Viedma is larger than both, not smaller. Choice D is incorrect: Viedma is larger than O’Higgins, not smaller.
